description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU Nightly Build that triggers on pull requests to main, pushes to main, a daily cron schedule, and manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_on_cpu and test_on_gpu. The build_on_cpu job runs on a linux.12xlarge host, sets up the environment, installs dependencies, builds FBGEMM_GPU, and uploads the built wheel as a GHA artifact. The test_on_gpu job runs on a linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu host, downloads the artifact, tests FBGEMM_GPU installation, runs PyTest, and pushes the binary to PyPI if the workflow is not triggered by a pull request or push.
